headline: Suja Life Sees 66% EBITDA Growth as Functional Beverage Boom Accelerates
summary: By Karen Roman Suja Life, Inc. (Nasdaq: SUJA) said first quarter net sales grew 22.5% to $107.1 million compared to $87.4 million the year prior, while gross profit increased 24.3% […]
